messages.content:
For info and records

----- Forwarded by Pawan Lohia/Audit/Calcutta/ErnstYoung/IN on 14-03-12 
03:18 PM -----




Welcome To E-Meditek

automail 
to:
Pawan.Lohia
14-03-12 03:16 PM





Dear Mr. Pawan Lohia, 
  
E-Meditek Welcomes You. 
  

We are grateful for an opportunity to be TPA for your Mediclaim policy. 
  
In our endeavor to make all our services user friendly and effective, we 
have introduced a Web Enabled Service for you. This Web Enabled Service 
will offer a wide range of services starting from complete access of your 
profile, claim status and to download your E-Cards. 
  
You are requested to follow the below steps to download your EâCard: 
  
Step 1:         Log-on to EMSL web site:  www.emeditek.com 
  
Step 2:         Select USER LOG IN & Click on Card Holder Option. 
  
Step 3:         Log-in using following:- 
  
User Name    : SRB1IN010C00335
Password      : SRB1IN010C00335
  
Step 4:         Select Membership Card option to view your E-Card. 
  
HEALTH COVERAGE FEATURES: 
Pre-existing diseases are covered 
Insured Co-Pay = 20% on all Claims. 
Maternity Limit: Caesarian â 50,000 
Normal - 40,000 
Cataract Limit: 40,000 
Knee Replacement Limit = 1.25 lacs 
Baby is covered from day one under the maternity limit (of 50 K in case of 
Caesarian and 40 K in case of Normal delivery case) till 90 days. 
Room Rent Limits Rs 3,000/- for Sum Insured of 2 Lacs for employee with HR 
band 4, 5, & 6.
Rs. 5, 000/- For Sum Insured of 3 Lacs, 4 Lacs & 6 Lacs for employee with 
HR band 3, 2 & 1 respectively. 
 
Points to remember:
 
Â·         Cashless Claim should be intimated within 24 to 48 hrs of 
hospitalization
Â·         In case of reimbursement:
o    Claim should be intimated 7-days from the date of admission or before 
discharge from the Hospital.
o    Claim papers should only be submitted to your location HR Coordinator 
and NOT to E-meditek directly.
o    Documents should reach TPA within 7 days from the date of discharge.
o    All the documents should be in original including original reports 
along with duly filled claim form & Checklist.
  
Please find below the Contact Details of E-Meditek TPA Services Limited
